reason: acceptance: cargo test 并发用例覆盖 cancel token + persist_turn 不丢 + idempotent + 多 request 隔离
acceptance: stream select 包裹后, ChatEvent 流时序不变 (Done/Error 仍正确发出)
acceptance: cancelled 不走 LlmErrorCategory, 前端可区分 'user stopped' vs 'real error'
acceptance: tracing 字段完整, 调试时能 grep request_id 看到 cancel 时间点
acceptance: pnpm build + (如适用) vitest 通过
acceptance: Stop 按钮 conditional render 符合组件规范
acceptance: Pinia store cancelled 状态不污染 error, send/cancel state machine 完整
acceptance: 根因留痕, spike #4 在 PR5 后可标 [RESOLVED]
